must_do.full_text:
18-year-old American found a roofing company on Google Maps with 4.9 stars and no website, copied their reviews and pasted them into ChatGPT 5.5.

2 minutes later - a complete brief. 

Pasted it into AI and just waited while the system built a full website with all pages, reviews https://t.co/4ndcrcN4oA

- extended sdf, srdf, urdf support

First up: Appshots, a new way to bring the context of what you’re working on into Codex.

On your Mac, press Command-Command to attach your app window to a Codex thread. Codex gets both a screenshot and text from the window, https://t.co/R0EcZRCc1d

99.5% of Mars has been mapped at 5 meters per pixel. We've had a complete high-resolution mosaic of a planet 225 million kilometers away since 2023.
